---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=.@"]
---

# snack

## find targeted files

```{julia}
# find the targeted files
dir = "./"
files = filter(file -> occursin(r"^\d\d", file), readdir(dir))
```

```{julia}
# sort according to some rules.
sort!(files; by = file -> parse(Int, match(r"^(\d\d)", file)[1]))
```
